message:
fix(cancel): include ObjectId in CancelBroadcaster dedup key for cross-object safety

Change SeenSequences key from (token_id, sequence) to (ObjectId,
token_id, sequence) so that cancel messages from different objects with
coincidentally matching token IDs and sequence numbers are not
incorrectly deduplicated. Updates is_seen/mark_seen signatures and the
eviction test to use the three-element key.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
